hero.title: Professional cleaning for home and office
hero.subtitle: Standard, deep, subscription, and post-construction cleaning in Plovdiv and the surrounding area. Book online — we arrive with the team and the equipment.

services.title: Care for every kind of space
services.subtitle: Pick the service — we deliver the result. Custom quote on request, a fixed team, quality guaranteed.

items.title: Fixed team
items.body: The same trained crew every visit — no surprises, no repeat explanations.

items.title: Transparent quotes
items.body: You get a quote before the visit. No hidden fees, no surcharges.

items.title: Safe products
items.body: Certified products that are safe for children, pets and people with allergies.

items.title: Insured and guaranteed
items.body: Every team is insured. Not happy — we come back, no extra charge.

contactCta.title: Ready when you are
contactCta.subtitle: Tell us briefly what you need and we'll come back with a quote within one working day.

cookies.bannerBody: We use cookies for marketing and analytics. Accepting allows their use.
cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: This site uses storage technologies (cookies and similar) in your browser. Some are required for the site to function. Others are used for marketing and analytics — these are only activated if you accept them.

table.name: _gcl_au, _gcl_aw, _gcl_dc
table.purpose: Google Ads attribution for completed forms

cookies.controlBody: You can withdraw or re-grant consent at any time.

blocks.heading: 1. Who we are
blocks.body: {{legalName}} ("we", "us", "our") is the data controller within the meaning of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) for all personal data collected through this website. For privacy questions: {{email}} or {{phone}}.

blocks.heading: 2. What we collect
blocks.body: Through the contact form: your name (optional), phone number, email address, short message, and marketing consent. When you visit the site we may also collect: IP address, device and browser type, pages visited, traffic source (e.g. an ad click). These are collected only if you accept marketing cookies.

blocks.heading: 3. Why we collect it
blocks.body:
• To respond to your enquiry with a quote.
• To send marketing emails if you ticked the corresponding consent.
• To measure ad-campaign effectiveness (only with your consent).
• To meet legal obligations (accounting, responding to competent authorities).

blocks.heading: 4. Legal basis
blocks.body:
• Pre-contractual measures (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — to handle your enquiry.
• Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) — for marketing emails and marketing/analytics cookies.
• Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) — to protect the form against spam and abuse.

blocks.heading: 5. Retention period
blocks.body: Contact-form enquiries are kept for up to 24 months from submission. Marketing-list emails are kept until you withdraw consent. Accounting data is kept as required by applicable law (typically 10 years).

blocks.heading: 6. Who we share data with
blocks.body:
• Web3Forms (USA) — processes form submissions and delivers them to our inbox. Protected with TLS.
• Google (USA) — Google Ads and (when enabled) Google Analytics for measuring ad-campaign effectiveness, only with your consent.
• Hosting and email providers — for storing and delivering submitted enquiries.

We do not sell data to third parties.

blocks.heading: 7. Your rights
blocks.body:
You have the right to:
• request access to data we hold about you
• request correction or deletion
• restrict processing
• object to processing
• withdraw any consent at any time
• lodge a complaint with the Bulgarian Data Protection Commission (kzld.bg)

To exercise these rights, email {{email}}.

blocks.heading: 8. Security
blocks.body: Data is transmitted only over an encrypted HTTPS connection. Access to submissions is limited to people engaged in customer service. We keep only the data needed to deliver the service.

blocks.heading: 9. Changes to this policy
blocks.body: On a change we update the date above and publish the new version on this page. For significant changes, we contact you by email if you are already registered with us.
